headline: Edison International (EIX) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: Edison International (EIX) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Underweight on Edison International, Lowers Price Target to $70
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst David Arcaro   maintains Edison International (NYSE:EIX) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $71 to $70.

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Edison International with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $82
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   initiates coverage on Edison International (NYSE:EIX) with a Hold rating and announces Price Target of $82.
